title: pimelea pseudolyallii
intro: Pimelea pseudolyallii, also known as Kowhiti, is a perennial flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to provide various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Pimelea pseudolyallii is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use and preparation may vary depending on the source and intended application.
